operations.description: Create a new vehicle in the organization.
operations.purpose: Register a new vehicle in the Samsara fleet system.
operations.usage: Used when adding new vehicles to the organization's fleet database.

operations.description: Retrieve all vehicles in the organization.
operations.purpose: Fetch a list of all vehicles managed by the fleet system.
operations.usage: Used in dashboards or fleet monitoring systems to show all available vehicles.

query_parameters.name: limit
query_parameters.description: Maximum number of vehicles returned in the response.

query_parameters.name: after
query_parameters.description: Pagination cursor used to fetch the next page of results.

query_parameters.name: tagIds
query_parameters.description: Filter vehicles based on tag IDs.

query_parameters.name: updatedAfterTime
query_parameters.description: Return vehicles updated after the specified timestamp.

query_parameters.name: createdAfterTime
query_parameters.description: Return vehicles created after the specified timestamp.

operations.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific vehicle.
operations.purpose: Fetch detailed information about a vehicle using its unique ID.
operations.usage: Used when displaying detailed vehicle information in fleet management interfaces.

operations.purpose: Allows modification of vehicle attributes such as name, VIN, or license plate.
operations.usage: Used when updating vehicle records or correcting vehicle details.
